description_long: This is a DeWalt cordless electric drill, predominantly yellow with black accents, featuring a robust plastic and metal construction. The drill has a pistol-grip handle with a textured surface for improved grip and a visible trigger button. The front section houses a black, cylindrical chuck with numbered torque settings, but no drill bit is currently attached. The base of the handle contains a removable battery pack, labeled as an 18V XR Li-Ion 2.0Ah, which powers the tool. Ventilation slots are visible on the sides of the main body, aiding in heat dissipation during use. The drill displays clear branding and safety markings on its side, making it easily identifiable as a professional-grade power tool.
description: A yellow and black DeWalt cordless electric drill with a pistol grip, removable battery pack, and visible torque settings on the chuck. The tool features clear branding, ventilation slots, and a textured handle for grip.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the textured black grip, battery pack base, and the back of the handle.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the DeWalt branding, battery pack label, ventilation slots, and the full profile of the handle and chuck.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the cylindrical black chuck with no drill bit attached and the face of the battery pack.
description_view_3: Right side view showing additional ventilation slots, branding, and the full side profile of the drill.
